Aftersun (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $1,658,791Details
International Box Office $8,092,203
Worldwide Box Office $9,750,994
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories real and imagined fill the gaps between miniDV footage as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the man she didn’t.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$60,752 (3.7% of total gross)
Legs:12.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:17.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/97 max. theaters, 6.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $1,858,118

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2022 (Limited) by A24
International Releases: August 11th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
November 17th, 2022 (Limited) (Mexico)
November 18th, 2022 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
December 15th, 2022 (Limited) (Germany)
December 16th, 2022 (Limited) (Spain)
Video Release: December 20th, 2022 by A24
MPA Rating: R for some language and brief sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2751 (cert #54064), 9/28/2022)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, Same Role, Multiple Actors
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Family Vacations, Faulty Memory, Non-Chronological
Subgenre: Family Drama

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories real and imagined fill the gaps between miniDV footage as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the man she didn’t.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$60,752 (3.7% of total gross)

Domestic Share:17.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
